title: hieracium umbellatum subsp. kluchoricum
intro: Hieracium umbellatum subsp. kluchoricum is a subspecies of the Hieracium umbellatum plant, commonly known as the small hawk's beard or yellow hawk's beard, a perennial herb in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic activities. The health benefits associated with Hieracium umbellatum subsp. kluchoricum include its potential to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its efficacy and potential side effects.
